content.query:
CREATE VIEW v_ManufacturedQty
-- drop view v_ManufacturedQty
AS
SELECT        A.ItemNumber
, A.ItemDescription
, A.ProcurementGroup
, A.Warehouse
, A.ManufacturingNumber
, CAST(CAST(A.ReportDate AS VARCHAR(10)) AS DATE) AS ReportDate
, A.ManufacturedQty
, A.AccCost AS StandardCost
, A.AvgCost as AverageCost
, B.ActualCost AS ActualCost
, A.TotalCost AS TotalStandardCost
, B.ActualCost*A.ManufacturedQty AS TotalActualCost
, A.AvgCost*A.ManufacturedQty AS TotalAverageCost
FROM    (
    SELECT        MWH.ITNO AS ItemNumber
    , MI.ITDS AS ItemDescription
    , MI.PRGP AS ProcurementGroup
    , MWH.WHLO AS Warehouse
    , MWH.MFNO AS ManufacturingNumber
    , IT.TRDT AS ReportDate
    , SUM(IT.TRQT) AS ManufacturedQty
    , AVG(IT.TRPR) AS AccCost
    , AVG(MF.APPR) AS AvgCost
    , SUM(IT.TRPR * IT.TRQT) AS TotalCost
    FROM            M3.MWOHED AS MWH 
    INNER JOIN      M3.MITMAS AS MI ON MWH.ITNO = MI.ITNO 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN M3.MITTRA AS IT ON MWH.ITNO = IT.ITNO AND MWH.MFNO = IT.RIDN
    LEFT OUTER JOIN M3.MITFAC MF on MWH.ITNO = MF.ITNO
    WHERE        (MWH.WHHS >= 70) 
    AND (MWH.MAQA <> 0)
    GROUP BY MWH.ITNO, MI.ITDS, MI.PRGP, MWH.WHLO, MWH.MFNO, IT.TRDT
        ) AS A 
        
        LEFT OUTER JOIN
        
        (
            SELECT        RIDN AS ManufacturingNumber
            , SUM(TOAF/NULLIF(AIQT,0)) AS ActualCost
            FROM            M3.CPOMAT
            GROUP BY RIDN
        ) AS B ON A.ManufacturingNumber = B.ManufacturingNumber
